title: Transport in North Macedonia
content:
The following is a summary of the transport system of the Republic of North Macedonia. Railways. <br "total:" <br "standard gauge:" 1.435-m gauge (312 km electrified, all 25 kV 50 Hz) <br "note:" a new extension of the <a href="Kumanovo" Kumanovo</a -<a href="Beljakovci" Beljakovci</a line to the Bulgarian border is under construction.

Restructuring of national railway MZ into infrastructure and operating companies completed in July 2007. Roads. <br "total" (2002) 228 km of motorways (2008) Motorways. The main network consists of 7 corridors, a good length of which already have motorways.
